sections.title: After the completion of The Depths of Despair

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Artur.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Hello [player name]. Thanks for your help in recovering the Accord.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is the Accord important?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: The signing of the Accord marked the start of a golden age. Once the Royal Lords replaced the Council of Elders, Kourend prospered like never before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But that was a long time ago. Why does it matter now?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Because I think it's time for another golden age. The Kourend Council, like the Council of Elders before them, have failed to do a good job in running this kingdom.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And you think the five houses would do a better job?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What makes you say the Council have done a bad job?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: More crime. Fewer homes. More illness. Loss of jobs. The list goes on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But aren't the five houses partially to blame as well? They rule the cities.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: The Council sets the laws and the Council sets the budgets. We have to do as they say, just like everyone else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm, fair enough. Anyway, we'd better get off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough. See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

sections.title: After the completion of A Kingdom Divided

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there Artur. Actually... I guess I should say Your Majesty now.

lines.speaker: King Artur Hosidius
lines.text: For you friend, Artur is fine.

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: You should not dispense formalities Artur. A king should command respect.

lines.speaker: King Artur Hosidius
lines.text: I can command respect without using fancy titles, mother.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, how are you doing?

lines.speaker: King Artur Hosidius
lines.text: I have a lot of responsibility now. There's much to learn and not much time to learn it in. The loss of father still weighs heavily on me as well.

lines.speaker: King Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Still, I am well supported by those around me. I'm sure that with their help, I can be the ruler the people deserve.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure you can as well. Anyway, I'll let you get on with your work.

lines.speaker: King Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Until next time.
